global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product imagery and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with free shipping on a product.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: CrispBox product image
elements.description: A simple illustration of a product with two rectangular shapes resembling a box with transparent panels.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CrispBox' in a bold, modern font, positioned prominently.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' in a minimalist style, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Flash sale live' with a secondary line 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Book now' in a clear, inviting font, designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: CrispBox brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'CrispBox' displayed in a stylish font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, enhancing credibility.
